about.hero_title: The Smart Africa Youth Chapter in Chad
about.hero_desc: The Smart Africa Youth Chapter - Chad (SAYC Chad) is the youth branch of Smart Africa Alliance in Chad. It is a platform dedicated to young people aged 15 to 35, focused on education, collaboration, mentoring, and digital innovation.
about.vision_title: Transforming Africa through youth and innovation
about.vision_desc: Inspiring a new generation of young Africans to use technology and innovation to transform Africa, create opportunities, strengthen regional solidarity, and build a sustainable future.
about.seo_desc: Discover SAYC Chad, the 7th youth chapter of Smart Africa Alliance. Missions, values, and strategic pillars for Chadian youth.
about.seo_keywords: SAYC Chad, Smart Africa, Youth, Chad, Innovation, Souleymane Mahamat Saleh
about.focal_point_title: National Focal Point SAYC Chad & Tech Leader
about.focal_point_desc: Expert in Software Engineering and Actor of Digital Transformation in Africa
about.resources_desc: Find here the official documents presenting the vision and objectives of SAYC Chad.

resources.blueprints_desc: Discover Smart Africa's strategic guides (Blueprints) on digital identity, AI and more.

engagement.title: Commitment
engagement.desc: We are fully committed to the digital development of Chadian youth.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.desc: We believe in equal access to digital opportunities for all young people.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We strive for excellence in all our programs and initiatives.

ouverture.title: Openness
ouverture.desc: We foster exchanges and collaboration at the continental level.

engagement.title: Youth Engagement
engagement.desc: Encourage youth participation in the development of digital policies.

skills.title: Digital Skills
skills.desc: Deploy national and regional training in digital skills.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Organize bootcamps and pitch competitions for innovators.

home.hero_title: The Digital Future of Chadian Youth
home.hero_subtitle: Join the Smart Africa movement and transform your ideas into innovative digital solutions.
home.pilar_edu_desc: Access to certified training and capacity-building programs via the SADA platform.
home.pilar_policy_desc: Carry the voice of youth in decision-making bodies for a connected Africa.
home.pilar_infra_desc: Support access to technologies and foster local digital entrepreneurship.
home.cta_desc: SAYC Chad is more than a platform, it is a community committed to the technological future of the continent.
home.seo_desc: Smart Africa Youth Chapter Chad - 7th youth chapter dedicated to digital innovation in Chad.
home.seo_keywords: SAYC Chad, Smart Africa, Youth, Chad, Innovation, SADA
home.objectives_desc: Smart Africa's youth chapter is based on three fundamental objectives to transform Chadian youth.

home.initiatives_desc: SAYC Chad is the 7th youth chapter of Smart Africa. Smart Africa is a commitment by African heads of state to accelerate sustainable development.
